params.name: Golden Berry Award
params.description: The Golden Berry Award chooses the worst Murikan film of the year. At first, it was a spontaneous amusement created by movie fans but later attracted the public's attention. Now it has become a highly popular awarding ceremony, where there are no worst movies, only the worse!
